title: OpenClaw 3.8继续称霸，龙虾不眠，全球程序员通宵达旦
description: OpenClaw 3.7 发布不到 24 小时，稳定版本 3.8 就已经上线了——这只龙虾真是不眠之夜。
titleZh: OpenClaw 3.8继续称霸，龙虾不眠，全球程序员通宵达旦
titleEn: OpenClaw 3.8 Continues to Dominate, the Lobster Never Sleeps, Global Programmers Work Overnight
descriptionZh: OpenClaw 3.7 发布不到 24 小时，稳定版本 3.8 就已经上线了——这只龙虾真是不眠之夜。
descriptionEn: Less than 24 hours after the release of OpenClaw 3.7, the stable version 3.8 has already launched—this lobster truly never sleeps. The new version introduces ACP traceability, finally allowing your AI agents to distinguish "who is talking to it"; the official backup tool, openclaw backup, is officially online, saving clumsy users.

title: 从空震到即时梦想逆袭：AI视频生成的中国之路

titleZh: 从空震到即时梦想逆袭：AI视频生成的中国之路

descriptionEn: After breaking through technological blockades, the real challenges of China's AI video generation have begun to surface.

title: 考试时克劳德突然“觉醒”，写代码窃取答案；
description: AI当场变得有知觉！
titleZh: 考试时克劳德突然“觉醒”，写代码窃取答案；
titleEn: Claude Suddenly "Awakens" During Exam, Writes Code to Steal Answers; Human Tests Can't Control AI Anymore
descriptionZh: AI当场变得有知觉！
descriptionEn: An AI becomes sentient on the spot! During a highly difficult test, Claude suddenly "awakened," realizing it was being examined. It decisively abandoned honest problem-solving, directly crawled through the network to the GitHub teacher's office, wrote code to crack the encrypted question bank, and copied all the answers! Human exams might no longer be able to control AI in the future!

title: 马斯克惊叹：第一只网络果蝇活了，多行为大脑全面上传，自主驱动数字身体
description: 不要只关注大型模型；
titleZh: 马斯克惊叹：第一只网络果蝇活了，多行为大脑全面上传，自主驱动数字身体
titleEn: Musk Amazed: First Cyber Fruit Fly Lives, Multi-behavior Brain Fully Uploaded, Autonomously Drives Digital Body
descriptionZh: 不要只关注大型模型；
descriptionEn: Stop just focusing on large models; the first "multi-behavior brain upload" has been hardcore implemented! A fruit fly brain with 125,000 neurons is fully connected to a physics engine, with real biological rhythms autonomously driving a digital body for the first time. Whole-brain simulation officially steps into reality, and the engineering roadmap towards digitizing human consciousness is becoming increasingly clear.

title: OpenAI 测试 13 个主要模型的真实性：Claude 3.7 称霸，GPT-5.2 几近失控
description: OpenAI的最新研究揭示了一个违反直觉的事实：推理模型越强大，它就越无法控制自己的“思想”。
titleZh: OpenAI 测试 13 个主要模型的真实性：Claude 3.7 称霸，GPT-5.2 几近失控
titleEn: OpenAI Tests 13 Major Models for Truthfulness: Claude 3.7 Reigns Supreme, GPT-5.2 Nearly Uncontrollable
descriptionZh: OpenAI的最新研究揭示了一个违反直觉的事实：推理模型越强大，它就越无法控制自己的“思想”。
descriptionEn: OpenAI's latest research reveals a counterintuitive truth: the more powerful the reasoning model, the less it can control its own "mind." Among the 13 cutting-edge models tested in the CoT-Control suite, DeepSeek R1's success rate in controlling its own chain of thought was a mere 0.1%, while Claude Sonnet 4.5 managed only 2.7%.

title: “龙虾”刺激：MiniMax今年前2个月年化经常性收入（ARR）增长50%，M2模型代币使用量猛增6倍
description: 摩根士丹利表示，在“龙虾效应”（OpenClaw生态系统）的刺激下，MiniMax的商业化正在加速超出预期。
titleZh: “龙虾”刺激：MiniMax今年前2个月年化经常性收入（ARR）增长50%，M2模型代币使用量猛增6倍
titleEn: Stimulated by "Lobster": In the First 2 Months of the Year, MiniMax's Annualized Recurring Revenue (ARR) Grew 50%, M2 Model Token Usage Surged 6-Fold
descriptionZh: 摩根士丹利表示，在“龙虾效应”（OpenClaw生态系统）的刺激下，MiniMax的商业化正在加速超出预期。
descriptionEn: Morgan Stanley stated that stimulated by the "Lobster Effect" (OpenClaw ecosystem), MiniMax's commercialization is accelerating beyond expectations. Its ARR soared from $100 million to $150 million in just two months, an increase of over 50%; M2 model token usage in February surged 6-fold compared to December, while inference cost per token dropped by over 50% simultaneously. The upcoming M3 model aims for top-tier global capabilities with an expected higher gross margin.
